title: Membership
description: NIIMBL relies on its members to shape the direction of its research and provide expertise in diverse areas of biopharmaceutical manufacturing.
text:
IP BenefitsAll non-exclusive royalty free (NERF) IPAll NERF IP only for 2 programs PLUS project-participation-based IP for internal business use onlyAll NERF IP only for 1 program PLUS project-participation-based IP for internal business use onlyProject-participation-based IP for internal business use onlyN/A at program level; Project-participation-based IP for internal business use only
